content.title:
Welcome to ZARK Gaming
ASA 3x Cluster
content.text:
Oi, Survivors!

Welcome to ZARK Gaming ASA 3x.

Experience ARK the way it was meant to be played:
 • Balanced progression.
 • Meaningful breeding.
 • Long-term survival.

We're a friendly South African community focused on delivering a relaxed PvE experience without the drama, griefing, or unnecessary admin interference.

Before you charge off punching trees and annoying dodos, take a moment to visit the Server Info and Rules & Support pages.

Highlights:

• 3x Harvesting Rates
• 220 Max Wild Dino Level
• No Gameplay Mods
• Active Administration

Join our Discord for full rules, support, updates and community events.

Now grab your pickaxe, tame something dangerous, and try not to become dinosaur food.

content.title: Server Info
content.text:
SERVER IDENTITY
PvE-focused vanilla+ experience
Balanced progression with long-term survival in mind
Active South African hosted cluster

RATES
XP: 3x
Harvesting: 3x
Taming: 3x
Breeding: Custom balanced settings
Maturation: Adjusted for quality-of-life gameplay

GAMEPLAY SETUP
No gameplay-changing mods
Vanilla+ experience with quality-of-life improvements
No pay-to-win mechanics
No forced wipes

CLUSTER SETUP
Each ZARK cluster operates independently
No cross-cluster travel or transfers
Separate progression per cluster:
- ASA 3x Vanilla Cluster
- ASA 10x Modded Cluster
- ASE 10x Modded Cluster

FEATURES
Active admin support
Community events
Starter-friendly progression
Balanced PvE environment
Stable long-term server settings

IMPORTANT
Full rules, updates, and support are handled in Discord.
Join the community to stay informed and get help quickly.

content.title: Rules Page 2
content.text:
- Trade fairly, avoid sharing high-value items with new players.
- Help new players by offering guidance, not just free items.
- Report any exploits to Admins.
- Respect Admin decisions, do not spam complaints or harass staff.
- Support is offered on a best-effort-basis. Our Admins typically work during the day, but will be able to assist in the evenings or weekends.
- Use the Discord ticket system (#tickets) for issues and bug reports.
- Cheating, exploiting, or abusing mechanics will result in immediate action.
- No AFK farming, excessive auto-clicking, or macro abuse.
- Automated farms (e.g. gachas, dung beetles & seed farms) are allowed.
- Dino Breeding farms must be supervised or Dinos soul-balled to avoid lag.

These are only the highlights of our rules. See detailed rules at #Rules on our Discord channel below. By continuing, you acknowledge you have read and understand all rules.

content.title: <TextStyle.White>Maps</>
content.text:
This Cluster is currently equipped with 8x Maps:
- Aberration
- Astraeos
- Extinction
- Ragnarok
- Scorched Earth
- The Center
- The Island
- Valguero

content.title: <TextStyle.Green>Auto-Decay System</>
content.text:
This cluster has auto-decay timers on all structures and tamed dinosaurs, currently aligned with Ark Official Rules:
- Thatch : 4 days
- Wood & Adobe : 8 Days
- Stone : 12 days
- Metal : 16 days
- Vault: 16 days
- Tek : 20-80 days

content.title: <TextStyle.Yellow>News</>
content.text:
- Scheduled daily restart at 05:00 - 06:00
- See #live-status Discord channel for server status
